meanings.definition: cause a sharp or stinging pain or discomfort

examples: A bee stung my arm yesterday

meanings.definition: saddle with something disagreeable or disadvantageous
examples: They stuck me with the dinner bill
I was stung with a huge tax bill

meanings.definition: cause an emotional pain, as if by stinging

examples: feeling nettled from the constant teasing
felt really pissed at her snootiness
riled no end by his lies
